title: Nozomi and Sakuras ages
wikitext:
[]: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Thu Jan 07, 2016 2:55 am Does anyone have any idea about the age(s) of Nozomi and Sakura (pre-3.0 for the latter), since Gainax/Khara is apparently not interested in giving any official world on them? Rough estimates are fine.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Jan 07, 2016 3:01 am MarqFJA87 wrote: Does anyone have any idea about the age(s) of Nozomi and Sakura (pre-3.0 for the latter), since Gainax/Khara is apparently not interested in giving any official world on them? Rough estimates are fine.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Tue Jan 19, 2016 4:38 pm That does seem to be the common assumption in the fandom. Were you taking into account Sakura's and Nozomi's appearances during the relevant time frame? (In hindsight, I should've linked to them from the beginning for courtesy's sake.) Sakura in 2.0  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jan 19, 2016 4:45 pm Edit: Never mind! Already fixed Nozomi does look younger than Sakura to me. She has a rounder face and her eyes are a little bigger proportionally.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Tue Jan 19, 2016 4:51 pm Yeah, though I would prefer seeing the two of them next to a single "object" of reference before firmly assuming that to be the case. Both of them appear to be tall enough to reach the shoulders of their respectivel 14-year-old older sibling, though in Nozomi's case this might be skewed by the nature of the illustration (i.e. her feet might actually end up standing on empty air with her positioning; again, the provided images don't allow us a proper estimate by comparison). Ugh, how come nobody ever thought of using these three characters in all of those "not-royally-screwed-up" AU spin-offs like the Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga? Things would probably be so much easier.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by amitakartok » Thu Jan 21, 2016 12:42 pm Because nobody knew how they looked like.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jan 23, 2016 10:47 am Yeah, I can't believe they finally have character designs.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 23, 2016 12:42 pm I really like Nozomi's design, but I don't think I'll ever get used to Kodama. Totally not what I had in mind for the woman.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 23, 2016 6:08 pm Okay, aside from Hikari I've never seen these characters before. Were they featured in something eva related, like a manga or something? Also, there's an odd disconnect between the designs of the two sisters and Hikari. Hikari still very much has a lot of key features that were iconic to Sadamoto's style in the 90's, but the two other girls look like they were designed only in the past couple of years. They look more like characters Sadamoto would design for a Mamoru Hosoda film, not an Evangelion film.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 23, 2016 6:17 pm Freaky : post/816437/Hikaris-sisters/#816437

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 23, 2016 6:26 pm Thanks. Wow, the train? That's it? Okay.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Thu Jan 28, 2016 4:51 pm amitakartok wrote: Because nobody knew how they looked like.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 28, 2016 5:12 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: That didn't stop people who only know Kyouko from the anime (in which we never get a clear shot of her) from writing her. More often than not, she was described as basically an adult-sized version of Asuka (lazy, I know, but better than nothing and has plenty of official precedent in many anime/manga), which of course means they gave her red hair instead of the blonde hair she sports in the manga and the few official spin-offs she shows up in.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jan 28, 2016 11:40 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: ... No offense intended, but I sure hope that you at least already knew of them by name, because I could not fathom the idea of an Evangelion fan that hasn't heard of their existence as characters yet (they're explicitly mentioned by name in the anime) unless they're quite new to the franchise.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 29, 2016 2:21 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: The fact that they aren't designed by Sadamoto

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jan 29, 2016 8:15 am We do actually know they're designed by Tsurumaki http://www.evastore.jp/pc/500type-eva-project.html http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4166.html

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Fri Jan 29, 2016 9:04 am Reichu wrote: In Sadamoto's manga, Kyoko is never seen in color. The blonde hair comes from the Raising Project manga, I thought. Also worth noting that the manga depictions diverge from what's shown in the anime (where Kyoko clearly doesn't have long, flowing tresses).

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 29, 2016 12:51 pm MarqFJA87 wrote: And as for Kyoko having shorter hair in the anime, the anime shots are of her after she went nuts and was hospitalized. The medical staff may have cut her hair short to simplify hygienic care for the insane woman.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by MarqFJA87 » Sat Jan 30, 2016 2:40 pm Reichu wrote: There's also the image of her that Asuka sees when they're reunited in EoE, meant to represent Asuka's vague memory of her mom actually being a mom, and Kyoko has short hair there, as well.

[]: Re: Nozomi and Sakura's ages?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jan 30, 2016 4:38 pm I always thought Kyoko look somewhat like Yui. Mostly it's the hair style. Both women are featured so little in their pre-Eva forms that I wonder if the bob haircut is visual shorthand in the series for motherhood. Rei is somewhat motherly, and she has a bob haircut. Just stick that on every actual mother character featured or otherwise glanced at in the series, and people will subconsciously get it.
